title: Greek Crumble Cookies
description: A twist on the classic cookie, adding a crunchy crumble topping for a delightful treat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, granulated sugar, and brown sugar.
Add in the unsalted butter and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place cookies on the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each cookie.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
While cookies are baking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing it with a fork until crumbly.
Remove cookies from the oven and sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over each cookie.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the crumble topping is lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
